## Check the formatting of a cross-sectional antibody survey dataset. {.unnumbered}


### Description

Check the formatting of a cross-sectional antibody survey dataset.



### Usage

<pre><code class='language-R'>check_pop_data(pop_data, verbose = FALSE)
</code></pre>


### Arguments

<table role = "presentation">
<tr><td style = "white-space: collapse; font-family: monospace; vertical-align: top"><code id="pop_data">pop_data</code></td>
<td>
dataset to check
</td></tr>
<tr><td style = "white-space: collapse; font-family: monospace; vertical-align: top"><code id="verbose">verbose</code></td>
<td>
whether to print an &quot;OK&quot; message when all checks pass
</td></tr>
</table>


### Value

NULL (invisibly)



### Examples
```{r, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, eval=TRUE}
library("serocalculator")

library(magrittr)

xs_data <-
  serocalculator_example("example_pop_data.csv") |>
  read.csv() |>
  as_pop_data()

check_pop_data(xs_data, verbose = TRUE)



```
